title: Apply for the Barbados YouthADVANCE Corps (BYAC)
description: Apply to join the Barbados YouthADVANCE Corps, a Ministry of Youth training and service programme.
summary: The Barbados YouthADVANCE Corps (BYAC) is a Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment programme. It gives young Barbadians training, work experience and a chance to serve their community.

Members come from across the island and go through a structured programme of skills training, physical conditioning and community work. Trades include construction, hospitality, agriculture and customer service, alongside life skills like budgeting and team work.
To apply, you complete a Recruitment Form. You also need a doctor to fill in a Health Assessment Form, and two referees to send in Reference Forms. The three documents go together as one application.
Recruitment intakes happen at set times each year. If you miss one, you can apply for the next. Successful applicants are invited to an interview before being offered a place.
who_can_apply: people in good health who can take part in physical training and community work

items: your full name, address and date of birth
your phone number and email address
the highest level of education you have completed
your areas of interest (for example, the trade you want training in)
the names and contact details of two referees

items.name: Most recent school report or certificates
Health Assessment Form
items.note: Completed and stamped by a doctor – see ‘Submit a BYAC health assessment’.

items.name: Two completed Reference Forms
items.note: One from each of your referees – see ‘Submit a BYAC reference form’.

how_long: Recruitment intakes happen at set times each year. You will get a reply within 6 to 8 weeks of the closing date.

options.heading: By email or in person
content: Send the completed Recruitment Form and your supporting documents to BYAC at #33 Warrens Industrial Park, Warrens, St. Michael. You can also email it.

edge_cases.heading: If you are under 18
content: You will need a parent or guardian to sign your application and your health assessment form.

contact.agency: Barbados YouthADVANCE Corps (BYAC), Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment
contact.address:
#33 Warrens Industrial Park
Warrens, St. Michael

assumptions: ‘Aged 16 to 30’ eligibility is the commonly-quoted range. The form does not state an age range.
‘A reply within 6 to 8 weeks of the closing date’ is an estimate.
List of trades (construction, hospitality, agriculture, customer service) is based on BYAC’s general programme, not the form itself.
Contact details (BYAC phone, info@byac.gov.bb email) are illustrative and should be confirmed.
